title: The Giants Rush Toward Crisis
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Usopp, Giants, Children as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: TAKE THAT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're not afraid of the celestial dragons, ya bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: G'HAAM! That was overkill, USOP!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it completely blew away her top half?! I'm soooo sorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's regenerating?! I felt bad for her, but this is creepy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must say, it is rather underlying to see the dead rise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Once it starts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KyaAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It cannot be undone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No one can stop it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAAAM!! I KNEW IT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The arrow must point to her target!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: leave it to me, usstop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: An attack that telegraphs itself... how absurd!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The countdown has started...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The world is already entangled...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...In the opening salvo of the coming great war!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It is said... the Giants' allegiance...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...will greatly shape how the conflict unfolds this time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A worldwide war?! That's never going to happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this plot was to take the kids as hostages...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and put Elbaf under your thumb!! That's beyond cowardly!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am merely carrying out the mission. It may well turn out to be a fruitless endeavor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't particularly understand the concept of 'hostages.' The lives of a few children are as worthless as trash to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's Wrong With You?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You FIENT!!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
